description:
We are looking for a Performance Marketing Manager with 3–7 years of experience to drive user acquisition and revenue growth through digital marketing channels. The ideal candidate is highly data-driven and has hands-on experience managing large-scale paid campaigns.

Key Responsibilities:
- Plan, execute, and optimize paid marketing campaigns across channels (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, etc.)
- Manage campaign budgets and ensure maximum ROI and efficiency
- Conduct A/B testing and experimentation to improve conversion rates
- Analyze campaign performance using analytics tools and generate actionable insights
- Develop and implement SEO and SEM strategies
- Collaborate with content, design, and product teams for campaign execution
- Track key performance metrics such as CAC, LTV, ROAS, and conversion rates
- Implement attribution models and track multi-channel performance
- Stay up to date with digital marketing trends and platform updates

Required Qualifications:
- 3–7 years of experience in digital/performance marketing
- Hands-on experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads platforms
- Strong analytical skills and experience with Google Analytics
- Experience with campaign optimization and performance tracking
- Familiarity with A/B testing and experimentation frameworks

Preferred Qualifications:
- Experience with marketing automation tools (HubSpot, Marketo)
- Knowledge of SEO, SEM, and conversion rate optimization (CRO)
- Experience managing large budgets and scaling campaigns
- Familiarity with attribution models and tracking tools

Soft Skills:
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Creativity combined with data-driven thinking
- Effective communication and collaboration

Education:
- Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or related field

Nice to Have:
- Experience in e-commerce or consumer internet companies
- Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS for landing page optimization
- Experience with CRM tools and lifecycle marketing

Keywords for ATS:
Performance Marketing, Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, SEM, A/B Testing, Google Analytics, ROAS, CAC, LTV, Campaign Optimization, Digital Marketing, Attribution
